channel.title: a9plus
channel.description: Hi! I'm a9 and I now have an RSS feed!

item.title: First Post!!!!!!!
item.description: This is my first post and I hope I will continue to post! IMAGE TEST. IF YOU SEE A TURTLE, its ok

item.title: Dear Peter: of war and hope.
item.description: Go here to read! Warning: contains sensitive topics, about the holocaust. do not read if you do not wish.
